objective: Additively supersede the unproven R08B-R1 acceptance by re-delivering the control-path verifier byte under its canonical Agent-0 owner, preserving the valid Agent-5 ops/tests bytes, and proving the literal versioned current-head Containerfile with a no-cache linux/amd64 BuildKit build.

actions: verify the historical Agent-5 diff is confined to the original ops/tests write-set after excluding the invalid tool path
witness the literal current-head no-cache linux/amd64 versioned Containerfile build inventory and startup evidence

tool_redelivery.method: two additive non-rewriting commits revert then reapply the exact one-line allowlist expectation under Agent-0 authority

exact_source_build.command: docker buildx build --no-cache --platform linux/amd64 --load --build-arg RELEASE_SHA=<exact-current-head> -f ops/release/Containerfile -t dcr-r08b-r2-core:<exact-current-head> .
bind: complete intended inventory and exact three provenance files
network-none rootless runtime startup with non-null executor profile and two bindings

acceptance_commands: git diff --name-only <authority-head>..<tool-reapply-head> is limited to the two amendment files and tools/verify_release_blueprint.py
git show <tool-revert-commit> and <tool-reapply-commit> prove Agent-0 additive redelivery with final bytes equal to the required sha256
literal exact-source no-cache linux/amd64 BuildKit command from current head succeeds
exact image inventory and network-none digest-bound AF_UNIX startup succeed
every new commit parses one contiguous four-key trailer block
correction receipt-head exact-head CI is green
stop_conditions: Agent-5 receives any lease or write authority for tools/**
ops/** or tests/** is mutated by Agent-0
the derived historical fallback is represented as the literal source build
candidate fields become non-null before the correction receipt-head CI is green
any prior commit receipt or evidence object is rewritten or deleted
any new commit fails the four-key interpret-trailers gate
next_gate: Only after accepted correction may the remaining parent R08B private pre-cut collector/provider work resume.
